title: bulbophyllum surigaense
intro: Bulbophyllum surigaense is a species of orchid native to the Philippines, specifically found in the Davao region. It is used in traditional medicine, where its roots and leaves are believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and relieving respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves of Bulbophyllum surigaense are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
